title: Fantazia
description: An rpg Minecraft mod with artifacts, talents, spells, etc
body:
**Current version**: 2.3.0

**Minecraft version**: 1.21.1

**Neo Forge Version**: 21.1.65 or newer

**Dependencies**: CuriosAPI, Patchouli, playerAnimator

Fantazia is aurthor's way to express their atristic tendencies using the programming skills as well as limited pixel art drawing and sound effect making talents!

![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46bfd1370329b7535e9b81b2bdac791a7bf1a649.png)


This mod provides the player with various magical-themed content, such as artifacrs which allow the player to use spells on other creatures or create auras around themselves which affect living things nearby. Another example of new content is talents that either give the player unique abilities (double jump, wall climbing, etc) or simply change their stats (health boost for example).

Fantazia also provides the player with new weapons and slightly alters the combat system; for example, swords can no be used to block melee attacks from enemies, similar to shields
